data.body: Epic complete. All 14 open children closed across this session. Three 'decide+adopt' tickets escalated to maintainer: e2e Jira probes kept as reference tooling (relocated out of wheel to scripts/jira-pressure-test/), jira-capability-probe adopted as reachable 'rebar bridge-probe' preflight, jira-credential-helper kept as onboarding groundwork (relocated to scripts/jira-onboarding-reference/, follow-up story vein-acid-navy filed). Path-migration story moved writable state .claude/->.rebar/. Residue sweep done. Documented residue per epic criterion: (1) inert legacy .claude-plugin/plugin.json guard in ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh:53 (manifest no longer exists post-extraction; not a write path); (2) three 'DSO_* support removed' env-surface docs (rebar-config.sh, applier.py, outbound_differ.py). Full suite green (1311 passed) at each checkpoint.
